<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see http://redis.io/commands/set */ class SET extends RedisCommand { /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function getId() { return 'SET'; } public function setArguments(array $arguments) { foreach ($arguments as $index => $value) { if ($index < 2) { continue; } if (false === $value || null === $value) { unset($arguments[$index]); } } parent::setArguments($arguments); } }
